title: Onyx Protocol - Rekt II
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by mint and redeem loop on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls mint() and redeem() in quick succession after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> mint() -> redeem() in single tx

red_flags: suspicious mint and redeem loop after flash loan
small amount of tokens being manipulated
monitoring_rules: BLOCK mint() and redeem() calls within 10 blocks of a flash loan borrow
summary: Onyx Protocol was exploited using a flash loan followed by a series of mint and redeem loops, resulting in a loss of $3.8 million. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for quick succession of mint and redeem calls after a flash loan.
